name: EOS Inc.
summary: EOS Inc., through its subsidiaries, markets and distributes various consumer products in the People's Republic of China, Taiwan, Singapore, Malaysia, and rest of Asia. It offers detergents; nutrition and dietary supplements; and skin care products, such as moisturizers, serums, cleansers, toners, body care, exfoliators, acne and oil correctors, facial masks, cleansing devices, and sun care products; and hair-coloring products, as well as water purifying machines. The company also sells and distributes micro-ceramic speakers. It sells its products to local distributors and specialty stores. EOS Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
